info.title: GitSMimeSign
info.description: A global tool for performing GIT SMime Sign operations.

options.name: --status-fd
options.description:
Write special status strings to the specified
file descriptor

options.name: --timestamp-authority
options.description:
(Default: http://timestamp.digicert.com) A URL to
the RFC 3161 time stamp authority.

options.name: --include-certs
options.description:
(Default: -2) This option overrides the command
line option --include-certs. A value of -2
includes all certificates except for the root
certificate, -1 includes all certificates, 0 does
not include any certificates, 1 includes only the
signers certificate and all other positive values
include up to value certificates starting with
the signer cert. Default is -2.

options.name: --keyid-format
options.description:
(Default: long) Select how to display key IDs.
'none' does not show the key ID at all but shows
the fingerprint in a separate line. 'short' is
the traditional 8-character key ID. 'long' is the
more accurate (but less convenient) 16-character
key ID. Add an '0x' to either to include an '0x'
at the beginning of the key ID, as in 0x99242560.

options.name: --list-keys
options.description: List all the keys available on the system.

options.name: --sign
options.description: Sign a object and make a signature.
